---
title: ""
image: images/sayalaruano3.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 600px;
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/sayalaruano
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sayalaruano
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/sayalaruano
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=QbDzPWMAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} Orcid"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9756-6745
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sebastian-Ayala-Ruano
---
<!-- ::: {.center-text} -->
## {{< fa hand-peace >}} Hey, I am Sebastián Ayala Ruano. Welcome!
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ::: {.small-text} -->
I am a young researcher and freelance data scientist, currently pursuing a master’s degree in Systems Biology at [Maastricht University](https://www.maastrichtuniversity.nl/nl), the Netherlands. I have worked in **Bioinformatics** and **Cheminformatics** for **five years** at different laboratories. My current research interests are devoted to **Network Science** and **Machine Learning** to study different biological phenomena. I am part of several research, open-science, and software development communities ([ISCBSC](https://iscbsc.org/), [The Carpentries](https://carpentries.org/), [Streamlit Creators](https://streamlit.io/creators), and [Open Life Science](https://openlifesci.org/)).
<!-- ::: -->
